title: Āwhina
subtitle: Aratohu me ngā whakautu kia whiwhi ai i te nuinga o tō tuhinga.
noResults: Kāore he tuhinga e ōrite ana ki "{{query}}".

allFeatures.title: Tirohia ngā āhuatanga katoa
allFeatures.subtitle: He rārangi katoa o ngā mea ka taea e koe — ka hono ia mea ki tāna aratohu.

articleNotFound: Kāore taua tuhinga āwhina e noho ana.

machineTranslationBanner.label: Whakamāori aunoa
machineTranslationBanner.body: I whakamāoritia tēnei tuhinga aunoa. Aroha mai mō ngā hapa — tukuna mai he urupare kia taea ai e mātou te whakatika.

palette.title: Āwhina
palette.description: Rapua i te Pokapū Āwhina, peke rānei ki tētahi pātuhi tere.
